description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch, as well as on a schedule and manually dispatched. The workflow runs tests on multiple platforms (ubuntu, macos, windows) and Python versions (3.9-3.13, pypy-3.9, pypy-3.10) with concurrency control. It uses actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, and yezz123/setup-uv to set up the environment, then runs tests with uvx nox. There are two jobs: one for regular tests and another for testing against NumPy nightly wheels on the latest Python version.
